# Ayah Daily — Full Overview

## What it is
Ayah Daily (also known as "One Verse Daily") is a free web app that presents one
Quran verse (ayah) each day with a clear translation and brief tafsir context.
It is built for calm, consistent Quran reading, reflection, and Islamic
education. Site: https://ayah-daily.web.app

## Core principles
- Free to use.
- No ads.
- No account or login required.
- Works in 12 languages.

## Features
- Daily verse: a single ayah highlighted each day for reflection.
- Translations: clear, readable translation of each verse.
- Brief tafsir: short context notes to aid understanding (not a substitute for
  scholarly study).
- Recitation / audio: Quran tilawat so verses can be heard as well as read.
- Random ayah discovery: surface a random verse on demand.
- Surah and ayah lookup: navigate directly to any surah and verse.
- 114-surah browser: browse the complete list of all 114 surahs.
- Glossary: plain-language definitions of key Quran terms.
- Progress tracking: keep track of daily reading habit.
- 12 languages: English (en), Bengali (bn), Arabic (ar), Urdu (ur), Indonesian
  (id), Turkish (tr), Persian/Farsi (fa), Malay (ms), French (fr), Spanish (es),
  Hindi (hi), Swedish (sv).

## URL structure
All content is served under a locale prefix. Replace {locale} with one of:
en, bn, ar, ur, id, tr, fa, ms, fr, es, hi, sv.

- Home (daily verse): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}
- Surah browser (all surahs): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/surahs
- Individual surah (id 1-114): https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/surah/{id}
- Glossary: https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/glossary
- About: https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/about
- How it works: https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/how-it-works
- FAQ: https://ayah-daily.web.app/{locale}/faq

## Glossary terms
The glossary defines core terms used across the app, including: ayah (verse),
surah (chapter), tafsir (exegesis/commentary), tilawat (recitation), juz (one of
the 30 parts of the Quran), and Quran (the scripture itself).

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://ayah-daily.web.app/sitemap.xml
- Short index for LLMs: https://ayah-daily.web.app/llms.txt
